overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person open-world game showing a character walking through an industrial urban area, transitioning from a street with light traffic to a waterfront dock with views of a city skyline, bridges, and a large cargo crane. The character explores a red-painted pier overlooking the water.

events.description: yellow taxi cab drives past the character on the left
black sedan drives along the road passing the character
character turns right to leave the street and head toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial street shoulder, moving past vehicles and warehouse buildings

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving past the character on the street
black sedan driving along the road

tall chain-link fence running along the right side of the street
elevated highway or train overpass in the distance
wooden utility pole with overhead power lines

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an industrial street with warehouse buildings on the left and a chain-link fence on the right. A yellow taxi and black sedan pass by on the road. The character continues forward then turns right toward a waterfront area, with an overpass visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway with concrete retaining walls and industrial barriers

events.description: character moves from the street onto the waterfront pedestrian path
view opens up to reveal the water body and distant city skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete waterfront path with a retaining wall on the left and views of water opening up to the right

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with weathered stains running along the waterfront
calm river or harbor water with reflections
dense cluster of skyscrapers and buildings across the water
large suspension bridge spanning the water in the distance
industrial crane structure visible on the dock ahead

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the street to a waterfront walkway, with a concrete retaining wall on the left. The view opens up to reveal a body of water with a city skyline and suspension bridge in the distance. An industrial cargo crane becomes visible ahead as the character approaches the dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial shipping dock with red painted surface and cargo crane

events.description: character steps onto the red painted dock surface
character stops walking and begins looking around at the scenic view
sailboat becomes visible on the water as camera pans left

agents.ego_description: walking onto the red dock, then stopping to observe the city skyline, water, and industrial crane before panning to view a sailboat

entered.detail: large red painted concrete dock platform with white edge markings
stacked cargo containers near the crane base
white sailboat with sails up moving on the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks onto a distinctive red-painted dock surface with a massive industrial cargo crane dominating the right side. The character stops near the crane and pans around to take in the view of the water, city skyline, and a sailboat passing by. The scene ends with the character standing still, looking out at the suspension bridge and distant buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined industrial street that gradually opens into a wide, scenic waterfront vista. It begins by following a character walking past warehouse buildings and a chain-link fence as a yellow taxi and black sedan pass by on the road. As the character turns right, the urban corridor transitions into a waterfront walkway where the view expands to reveal a distant city skyline and a suspension bridge across the water. The scene then shifts onto a distinctive red-painted dock, with the camera approaching a massive industrial cargo crane that dominates the right side of the frame. Finally, the character comes to a halt to pan across the water, observing a passing sailboat before settling on a still view of the distant bridge and city buildings.
